'''Quammo''' was a [[Sludir]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] working for [[gangster]] [[Guttu]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. At that time, Guttu said he had not moved by his own means since at least [[150 BBY/Legends|150 BBY]], which explains some of Quammo's responsibilities.
